title: Lemon Chicken
instructions: Combine chicken pieces and lemon juice in bowl and marinate overnight.
Drain chicken thoroughly and pat dry. Fill a plastic bag with flour, salt, paprika, and pepper and shake well to mix. Put 2 pieces of chicken in at a time and shake, coating completely.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees F. Heat corn oil in cast iron Dutch oven until hot. Fry chicken pieces, a few at a time, until well browned and crisp, about 5 minutes on each side.

Arrange browned chicken in a single layer in a large baking sheet. Sprinkle with lemon zest and brown sugar. Mix chicken stock and lemon extract together and pour around chicken pieces. Set a thin lemon slice on the top of each piece of chicken. Bake for 35 minutes or until tender. Yummy not or cold.
